narrative:
Lisbon Ex Vill Sd (Columbiana) exempted village school district has 3,483 registered voters, with 60.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.8 percentage points.
